testcase.name: Core Scenarios E2E Tests › Family Office Conservative Analysis Scenario › should emphasize conservative analysis and tax optimization

failure.message: core-scenarios-e2e.test.ts:216:9 should emphasize conservative analysis and tax optimization

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › __tests__/core-scenarios-e2e.test.ts:216:9 › Core Scenarios E2E Tests › Family Office Conservative Analysis Scenario › should emphasize conservative analysis and tax optimization
TimeoutError: locator.click: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button:text("Continue"), button:text("Next"), button:text("→")').first()
